dispatches.title: The Briareos Protocol
dispatches.summary: Recovery team encounters decommissioned combat unit operating outside its mandate. Secondary contact classified beyond correspondent clearance.

dispatches.title: Dust and Static
dispatches.summary: Communications array picks up structured noise from sector 7. Pattern analysis suggests non-natural origin.

dispatches.title: Phantom Signal
dispatches.summary: Survey relay picks up a repeating pulse from the northern exclusion zone. No registered transmitters in range.
